content.content:
1	name: Unit tests
2	
3	env:
4	  # enable colored output
5	  # https://github.com/pytest-dev/pytest/issues/7443
6	  PY_COLORS: 1
7	
8	on:
9	  pull_request:
10	    paths:
11	      - .github/workflows/python-tests.yaml
12	      - "src/prefect/**/*.py"
13	      - "tests/**/*.py"
14	      - pyproject.toml
15	      - uv.lock
16	      - Dockerfile
17	      - scripts/entrypoint.sh
18	      - scripts/verify_test_selection.py
19	  push:
20	    branches:
21	      - main
22	    paths:
23	      - .github/workflows/python-tests.yaml
24	      - "src/prefect/**/*.py"
25	      - "tests/**/*.py"
26	      - pyproject.toml
27	      - uv.lock
28	      - Dockerfile
29	      - scripts/entrypoint.sh
30	      - scripts/verify_test_selection.py
31	permissions:
32	  contents: read
33	  actions: write
34	
35	# Limit concurrency by workflow/branch combination.
36	#
37	# For pull request builds, pushing additional changes to the
38	# branch will cancel prior in-progress and pending builds.
39	#
40	# For builds triggered on a branch push, additional changes
41	# will wait for prior builds to complete before starting.
42	#
43	# https://docs.github.com/en/actions/using-jobs/using-concurrency
44	concurrency:
45	  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.head_ref || github.run_id }}
46	  cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' }}
47	
48	jobs:
49	  run-tests:
50	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
51	    name: ${{ matrix.test-type.name }} - python:${{ matrix.python-version }}, ${{ matrix.database }}
52	
53	    services:
54	      redis:
55	        image: redis:latest
56	        ports:
57	          - 6379:6379
58	        options: >-
59	          --health-cmd "redis-cli ping"
60	          --health-interval 10s
61	          --health-timeout 5s
62	          --health-retries 5
63	
64	      postgres:
65	        image: ${{ startsWith(matrix.database, 'postgres') && matrix.database || '' }}
66	        ports:
67	          - 5432:5432
68	        env:
69	          POSTGRES_USER: prefect
70	          POSTGRES_PASSWORD: prefect
71	          POSTGRES_DB: prefect
72	          LANG: C.UTF-8
73	          LANGUAGE: C.UTF-8
74	          LC_ALL: C.UTF-8
75	          LC_COLLATE: C.UTF-8
76	          LC_CTYPE: C.UTF-8
77	        options: >-
78	          --health-cmd "pg_isready"
79	          --health-interval 10s
80	          --health-timeout 5s
81	          --health-retries 5
82	          --tmpfs /var/lib/postgresql/data
83	
84	    strategy:
85	      fail-fast: false
86	      matrix:
87	        test-type:
88	          - name: Server Tests
89	            modules: tests/server/ tests/events/server --ignore=tests/server/database/ --ignore=tests/server/orchestration/
90	          - name: Database Tests
91	            modules: tests/server/database/
92	          - name: "Orchestration Tests: Core"
93	            modules: tests/server/orchestration/ --ignore=tests/server/orchestration/api/
94	          - name: "Orchestration Tests: API"
95	            modules: tests/server/orchestration/api/
96	          - name: "Client Tests: Modules"
97	            modules: >-
98	              tests/
99	              --ignore=tests/typesafety
100	              --ignore=tests/server/
101	              --ignore=tests/events/server
102	              --ignore=tests/test_task_runners.py
103	              --ignore=tests/runner
104	              --ignore=tests/workers
105	              --ignore=tests/cli/
106	              --ignore=tests/test_settings.py
107	              --ignore=tests/input/
108	              --ignore-glob="tests/test_*.py"
109	          - name: "Client Tests: Top-Level"
110	            modules: >-
111	              tests/test_artifacts.py
112	              tests/test_assets.py
113	              tests/test_automations.py
114	              tests/test_background_tasks.py
115	              tests/test_cache_policies.py
116	              tests/test_context.py
117	              tests/test_exceptions.py
118	              tests/test_filesystems.py
119	              tests/test_flow_engine.py
120	              tests/test_flow_runs.py
121	              tests/test_flows.py
122	              tests/test_flows_compat.py
123	              tests/test_futures.py
124	              tests/test_highlighters.py
125	              tests/test_infrastructure_bound_flow.py
126	              tests/test_locking.py
127	              tests/test_log_prints.py
128	              tests/test_logging.py
129	              tests/test_observers.py
130	              tests/test_plugins.py
131	              tests/test_schedules.py
132	              tests/test_serializers.py
133	              tests/test_states.py
134	              tests/test_subprocess_logging.py
135	              tests/test_task_engine.py
136	              tests/test_task_runs.py
137	              tests/test_task_worker.py
138	              tests/test_tasks.py
139	              tests/test_transactions.py
140	              tests/test_types.py
141	              tests/test_variables.py
142	              tests/test_versioning.py
143	              tests/test_waiters.py
144	          - name: Runner, Worker, Settings, Input, and CLI Tests
145	            modules: tests/test_task_runners.py tests/runner tests/workers tests/cli/ tests/test_settings.py tests/input/
146	        database:
147	          - "postgres:14"
148	          - "sqlite"
149	        python-version:
150	          - "3.10"
151	          - "3.11"
152	          - "3.12"
153	          - "3.13"
154	          - "3.14"
155	        exclude:
156	          - database: "sqlite"
157	            test-type:
158	              name: "Client Tests: Modules"
159	              modules: >-
160	                tests/
161	                --ignore=tests/typesafety
162	                --ignore=tests/server/
163	                --ignore=tests/events/server
164	                --ignore=tests/test_task_runners.py
165	                --ignore=tests/runner
166	                --ignore=tests/workers
167	                --ignore=tests/cli/
168	                --ignore=tests/test_settings.py
169	                --ignore=tests/input/
170	                --ignore-glob="tests/test_*.py"
171	          - database: "sqlite"
172	            test-type:
173	              name: "Client Tests: Top-Level"
174	              modules: >-
175	                tests/test_artifacts.py
176	                tests/test_assets.py
177	                tests/test_automations.py
178	                tests/test_background_tasks.py
179	                tests/test_cache_policies.py
180	                tests/test_context.py
181	                tests/test_exceptions.py
182	                tests/test_filesystems.py
183	                tests/test_flow_engine.py
184	                tests/test_flow_runs.py
185	                tests/test_flows.py
186	                tests/test_flows_compat.py
187	                tests/test_futures.py
188	                tests/test_highlighters.py
189	                tests/test_infrastructure_bound_flow.py
190	                tests/test_locking.py
191	                tests/test_log_prints.py
192	                tests/test_logging.py
193	                tests/test_observers.py
194	                tests/test_plugins.py
195	                tests/test_schedules.py
196	                tests/test_serializers.py
197	                tests/test_states.py
198	                tests/test_task_engine.py
199	                tests/test_task_runs.py
200	                tests/test_task_worker.py
201	                tests/test_tasks.py
202	                tests/test_transactions.py
203	                tests/test_types.py
204	                tests/test_variables.py
205	                tests/test_versioning.py
206	                tests/test_waiters.py
207	          - database: "sqlite"
208	            test-type:
209	              name: Runner, Worker, Settings, Input, and CLI Tests
210	              modules: tests/test_task_runners.py tests/runner tests/workers tests/cli/ tests/test_settings.py tests/input/
211	
212	    timeout-minutes: 15
213	
214	    steps:
215	      - name: Display current test matrix
216	        run: echo '${{ toJSON(matrix) }}'
217	
218	      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
219	        with:
220	          persist-credentials: false
221	          fetch-depth: 0
222	          filter: blob:none
223	
224	      - name: Set up uv and Python ${{ matrix.python-version }}
225	        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v7
226	        with:
227	          enable-cache: true
228	          python-version: ${{ matrix.python-version }}
229	          cache-dependency-glob: "pyproject.toml"
230	
231	      - name: Install packages
232	        run: uv sync --locked
233	
234	      - name: Set database connection URL
235	        if: ${{ startsWith(matrix.database, 'postgres') }}
236	        run: echo "PREFECT_SERVER_DATABASE_CONNECTION_URL=postgresql+asyncpg://prefect:prefect@localhost/prefect" >> $GITHUB_ENV
237	
238	      - name: Run tests
239	        run: |
240	          uv run pytest ${{ matrix.test-type.modules }} \
241	          -m "not windows" \
242	          --numprocesses auto \
243	          --maxprocesses 6 \
244	          --dist worksteal \
245	          --disable-docker-image-builds \
246	          --exclude-service kubernetes \
247	          --exclude-service docker \
248	          --durations 26 \
249	
250	      - name: Check database container
251	        # Only applicable for Postgres, but we want this to run even when tests fail
252	        if: always()
253	        run: |
254	          docker container inspect ${{ job.services.postgres.id }} \
255	          && docker container logs ${{ job.services.postgres.id }} \
256	          || echo "Ignoring bad exit code"
257	
258	  verify-test-selection:
259	    name: Verify test selection coverage
260	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
261	    steps:
262	      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
263	        with:
264	          persist-credentials: false
265	
266	      - name: Set up uv
267	        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v7
268	        with:
269	          python-version: "3.12"
270	
271	      - name: Verify all test modules are selected
272	        run: uv run --with pyyaml --no-project -s scripts/verify_test_selection.py
273	
274	  run-docker-tests:
275	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
276	    name: docker, python:${{ matrix.python-version }}
277	
278	    services:
279	      redis:
280	        image: redis:latest
281	        ports:
282	          - 6379:6379
283	        options: >-
284	          --health-cmd "redis-cli ping"
285	          --health-interval 10s
286	          --health-timeout 5s
287	          --health-retries 5
288	
289	      postgres:
290	        image: ${{ matrix.database }}
291	        ports:
292	          - 5432:5432
293	        env:
294	          POSTGRES_USER: prefect
295	          POSTGRES_PASSWORD: prefect
296	          POSTGRES_DB: prefect
297	          LANG: C.UTF-8
298	          LANGUAGE: C.UTF-8
299	          LC_ALL: C.UTF-8
300	          LC_COLLATE: C.UTF-8
301	          LC_CTYPE: C.UTF-8
302	        options: >-
303	          --health-cmd "pg_isready"
304	          --health-interval 10s
305	          --health-timeout 5s
306	          --health-retries 5
307	          --tmpfs /var/lib/postgresql/data
308	
309	    strategy:
310	      matrix:
311	        database:
312	          - "postgres:14"
313	        python-version:
314	          - "3.10"
315	          - "3.11"
316	          - "3.12"
317	          - "3.13"
318	          - "3.14"
319	
320	      fail-fast: false
321	
322	    timeout-minutes: 45
323	
324	    steps:
325	      - name: Display current test matrix
326	        run: echo '${{ toJSON(matrix) }}'
327	
328	      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
329	        with:
330	          persist-credentials: false
331	          fetch-depth: 0
332	          filter: blob:none
333	
334	      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
335	        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v4
336	
337	      - name: Set up uv and Python ${{ matrix.python-version }}
338	        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v7
339	        with:
340	          enable-cache: true
341	          python-version: ${{ matrix.python-version }}
342	          cache-dependency-glob: "pyproject.toml"
343	
344	      - name: Get image tag
345	        id: get_image_tag
346	        run: |
347	          SHORT_SHA=$(git rev-parse --short=7 HEAD)
348	          tmp="sha-$SHORT_SHA-python${{ matrix.python-version }}"
349	          echo "image_tag=${tmp}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
350	
351	      - name: Get node version
352	        id: get_node_version
353	        run: |
354	          echo "NODE_VERSION=$(cat .nvmrc)" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
355	
356	      - name: Login to DockerHub
357	        uses: docker/login-action@v4
358	        if: github.event.pull_request.head.repo.full_name == github.repository && github.actor != 'dependabot[bot]'
359	        with:
360	          username: ${{ secrets.DOCKERHUB_USERNAME }}
361	          password: ${{ secrets.DOCKERHUB_TOKEN }}
362	
363	      - name: Build test image
364	        uses: docker/build-push-action@v7
365	        env:
366	          DOCKER_BUILD_SUMMARY: false
367	          DOCKER_RECORD_UPLOAD: false
368	        with:
369	          context: .
370	          build-args: |
371	            PYTHON_VERSION=${{ matrix.python-version }}
372	            PREFECT_EXTRAS=[dev]
373	            NODE_VERSION=${{ steps.get_node_version.outputs.NODE_VERSION }}
374	          tags: prefecthq/prefect-dev:${{ steps.get_image_tag.outputs.image_tag }}
375	          outputs: type=docker,dest=/tmp/image.tar
376	          cache-from: type=gha,scope=test-${{ matrix.python-version }},ignore-error=true
377	          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max,scope=test-${{ matrix.python-version }},ignore-error=true
378	
379	      - name: Test Docker image
380	        run: |
381	          docker load --input /tmp/image.tar
382	          docker run --rm prefecthq/prefect-dev:${{ steps.get_image_tag.outputs.image_tag }} prefect version
383	
384	      - name: Install packages
385	        run: uv sync --locked
386	
387	      - name: Set database connection URL
388	        if: ${{ startsWith(matrix.database, 'postgres') }}
389	        run: echo "PREFECT_SERVER_DATABASE_CONNECTION_URL=postgresql+asyncpg://prefect:prefect@localhost/prefect" >> $GITHUB_ENV
390	
391	      - name: Start docker registry
392	        run: >
393	          docker run
394	          --name "prefect-test-registry"
395	          --detach
396	          --publish 5555:5000
397	          registry:2
398	
399	      - name: Check git diff
400	        run: |
401	          git diff --exit-code
402	
403	      - name: Run tests
404	        run: |
405	          uv run pytest tests --ignore=tests/typesafety \
406	          -m "not windows" \
407	          --numprocesses auto \
408	          --maxprocesses 6 \
409	          --dist worksteal \
410	          --disable-docker-image-builds \
411	          --only-service docker \
412	          --durations 26
413	
414	      - name: Check database container
415	        # Only applicable for Postgres, but we want this to run even when tests fail
416	        if: always()
417	        run: |
418	          docker container inspect ${{ job.services.postgres.id }} \
419	          && docker container logs ${{ job.services.postgres.id }} \
420	          || echo "Ignoring bad exit code"
421	
422	  run-typesafety-test:
423	    name: typesafety
424	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
425	
426	    steps:
427	      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
428	        with:
429	          persist-credentials: false
430	          fetch-depth: 0
431	          filter: blob:none
432	
433	      - name: Set up uv
434	        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v7
435	        with:
436	          enable-cache: true
437	          python-version: "3.12"
438	          cache-dependency-glob: "pyproject.toml"
439	
440	      - name: Install packages
441	        run: uv sync --locked
442

446	          --disable-docker-image-builds

file.content:
name: Unit tests

env:
  # enable colored output
  # https://github.com/pytest-dev/pytest/issues/7443
  PY_COLORS: 1

on:
  pull_request:
    paths:
      - .github/workflows/python-tests.yaml
      - "src/prefect/**/*.py"
      - "tests/**/*.py"
      - pyproject.toml
      - uv.lock
      - Dockerfile
      - scripts/entrypoint.sh
      - scripts/verify_test_selection.py
  push:
    branches:
      - main
    paths:
      - .github/workflows/python-tests.yaml
      - "src/prefect/**/*.py"
      - "tests/**/*.py"
      - pyproject.toml
      - uv.lock
      - Dockerfile
      - scripts/entrypoint.sh
      - scripts/verify_test_selection.py
permissions:
  contents: read
  actions: write

# Limit concurrency by workflow/branch combination.
#
# For pull request builds, pushing additional changes to the
# branch will cancel prior in-progress and pending builds.
#
# For builds triggered on a branch push, additional changes
# will wait for prior builds to complete before starting.
#
# https://docs.github.com/en/actions/using-jobs/using-concurrency
concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.head_ref || github.run_id }}
  cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' }}

jobs:
  run-tests:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    name: ${{ matrix.test-type.name }} - python:${{ matrix.python-version }}, ${{ matrix.database }}

    services:
      redis:
        image: redis:latest
        ports:
          - 6379:6379
        options: >-
          --health-cmd "redis-cli ping"
          --health-interval 10s
          --health-timeout 5s
          --health-retries 5

      postgres:
        image: ${{ startsWith(matrix.database, 'postgres') && matrix.database || '' }}
        ports:
          - 5432:5432
        env:
          POSTGRES_USER: prefect
          POSTGRES_PASSWORD: prefect
          POSTGRES_DB: prefect
          LANG: C.UTF-8
          LANGUAGE: C.UTF-8
          LC_ALL: C.UTF-8
          LC_COLLATE: C.UTF-8
          LC_CTYPE: C.UTF-8
        options: >-
          --health-cmd "pg_isready"
          --health-interval 10s
          --health-timeout 5s
          --health-retries 5
          --tmpfs /var/lib/postgresql/data

    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        test-type:
          - name: Server Tests
            modules: tests/server/ tests/events/server --ignore=tests/server/database/ --ignore=tests/server/orchestration/
          - name: Database Tests
            modules: tests/server/database/
          - name: "Orchestration Tests: Core"
            modules: tests/server/orchestration/ --ignore=tests/server/orchestration/api/
          - name: "Orchestration Tests: API"
            modules: tests/server/orchestration/api/
          - name: "Client Tests: Modules"
            modules: >-
              tests/
              --ignore=tests/typesafety
              --ignore=tests/server/
              --ignore=tests/events/server
              --ignore=tests/test_task_runners.py
              --ignore=tests/runner
              --ignore=tests/workers
              --ignore=tests/cli/
              --ignore=tests/test_settings.py
              --ignore=tests/input/
              --ignore-glob="tests/test_*.py"
          - name: "Client Tests: Top-Level"
            modules: >-
              tests/test_artifacts.py
              tests/test_assets.py
              tests/test_automations.py
              tests/test_background_tasks.py
              tests/test_cache_policies.py
              tests/test_context.py
              tests/test_exceptions.py
              tests/test_filesystems.py
              tests/test_flow_engine.py
              tests/test_flow_runs.py
              tests/test_flows.py
              tests/test_flows_compat.py
              tests/test_futures.py
              tests/test_highlighters.py
              tests/test_infrastructure_bound_flow.py
              tests/test_locking.py
              tests/test_log_prints.py
              tests/test_logging.py
              tests/test_observers.py
              tests/test_plugins.py
              tests/test_schedules.py
              tests/test_serializers.py
              tests/test_states.py
              tests/test_subprocess_logging.py
              tests/test_task_engine.py
              tests/test_task_runs.py
              tests/test_task_worker.py
              tests/test_tasks.py
              tests/test_transactions.py
              tests/test_types.py
              tests/test_variables.py
              tests/test_versioning.py
              tests/test_waiters.py
          - name: Runner, Worker, Settings, Input, and CLI Tests
            modules: tests/test_task_runners.py tests/runner tests/workers tests/cli/ tests/test_settings.py tests/input/
        database:
          - "postgres:14"
          - "sqlite"
        python-version:
          - "3.10"
          - "3.11"
          - "3.12"
          - "3.13"
          - "3.14"
        exclude:
          - database: "sqlite"
            test-type:
              name: "Client Tests: Modules"
              modules: >-
                tests/
                --ignore=tests/typesafety
                --ignore=tests/server/
                --ignore=tests/events/server
                --ignore=tests/test_task_runners.py
                --ignore=tests/runner
                --ignore=tests/workers
                --ignore=tests/cli/
                --ignore=tests/test_settings.py
                --ignore=tests/input/
                --ignore-glob="tests/test_*.py"
          - database: "sqlite"
            test-type:
              name: "Client Tests: Top-Level"
              modules: >-
                tests/test_artifacts.py
                tests/test_assets.py
                tests/test_automations.py
                tests/test_background_tasks.py
                tests/test_cache_policies.py
                tests/test_context.py
                tests/test_exceptions.py
                tests/test_filesystems.py
                tests/test_flow_engine.py
                tests/test_flow_runs.py
                tests/test_flows.py
                tests/test_flows_compat.py
                tests/test_futures.py
                tests/test_highlighters.py
                tests/test_infrastructure_bound_flow.py
                tests/test_locking.py
                tests/test_log_prints.py
                tests/test_logging.py
                tests/test_observers.py
                tests/test_plugins.py
                tests/test_schedules.py
                tests/test_serializers.py
                tests/test_states.py
                tests/test_task_engine.py
                tests/test_task_runs.py
                tests/test_task_worker.py
                tests/test_tasks.py
                tests/test_transactions.py
                tests/test_types.py
                tests/test_variables.py
                tests/test_versioning.py
                tests/test_waiters.py
          - database: "sqlite"
            test-type:
              name: Runner, Worker, Settings, Input, and CLI Tests
              modules: tests/test_task_runners.py tests/runner tests/workers tests/cli/ tests/test_settings.py tests/input/

    timeout-minutes: 15

    steps:
      - name: Display current test matrix
        run: echo '${{ toJSON(matrix) }}'

      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
        with:
          persist-credentials: false
          fetch-depth: 0
          filter: blob:none

      - name: Set up uv and Python ${{ matrix.python-version }}
        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v7
        with:
          enable-cache: true
          python-version: ${{ matrix.python-version }}
          cache-dependency-glob: "pyproject.toml"

      - name: Install packages
        run: uv sync --locked

      - name: Set database connection URL
        if: ${{ startsWith(matrix.database, 'postgres') }}
        run: echo "PREFECT_SERVER_DATABASE_CONNECTION_URL=postgresql+asyncpg://prefect:prefect@localhost/prefect" >> $GITHUB_ENV

      - name: Run tests
        run: |
          uv run pytest ${{ matrix.test-type.modules }} \
          -m "not windows" \
          --numprocesses auto \
          --maxprocesses 6 \
          --dist worksteal \
          --disable-docker-image-builds \
          --exclude-service kubernetes \
          --exclude-service docker \
          --durations 26 \

      - name: Check database container
        # Only applicable for Postgres, but we want this to run even when tests fail
        if: always()
        run: |
          docker container inspect ${{ job.services.postgres.id }} \
          && docker container logs ${{ job.services.postgres.id }} \
          || echo "Ignoring bad exit code"

  verify-test-selection:
    name: Verify test selection coverage
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Set up uv
        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v7
        with:
          python-version: "3.12"

      - name: Verify all test modules are selected
        run: uv run --with pyyaml --no-project -s scripts/verify_test_selection.py

  run-docker-tests:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    name: docker, python:${{ matrix.python-version }}

    services:
      redis:
        image: redis:latest
        ports:
          - 6379:6379
        options: >-
          --health-cmd "redis-cli ping"
          --health-interval 10s
          --health-timeout 5s
          --health-retries 5

      postgres:
        image: ${{ matrix.database }}
        ports:
          - 5432:5432
        env:
          POSTGRES_USER: prefect
          POSTGRES_PASSWORD: prefect
          POSTGRES_DB: prefect
          LANG: C.UTF-8
          LANGUAGE: C.UTF-8
          LC_ALL: C.UTF-8
          LC_COLLATE: C.UTF-8
          LC_CTYPE: C.UTF-8
        options: >-
          --health-cmd "pg_isready"
          --health-interval 10s
          --health-timeout 5s
          --health-retries 5
          --tmpfs /var/lib/postgresql/data

    strategy:
      matrix:
        database:
          - "postgres:14"
        python-version:
          - "3.10"
          - "3.11"
          - "3.12"
          - "3.13"
          - "3.14"

      fail-fast: false

    timeout-minutes: 45

    steps:
      - name: Display current test matrix
        run: echo '${{ toJSON(matrix) }}'

      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
        with:
          persist-credentials: false
          fetch-depth: 0
          filter: blob:none

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v4

      - name: Set up uv and Python ${{ matrix.python-version }}
        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v7
        with:
          enable-cache: true
          python-version: ${{ matrix.python-version }}
          cache-dependency-glob: "pyproject.toml"

      - name: Get image tag
        id: get_image_tag
        run: |
          SHORT_SHA=$(git rev-parse --short=7 HEAD)
          tmp="sha-$SHORT_SHA-python${{ matrix.python-version }}"
          echo "image_tag=${tmp}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Get node version
        id: get_node_version
        run: |
          echo "NODE_VERSION=$(cat .nvmrc)" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Login to DockerHub
        uses: docker/login-action@v4
        if: github.event.pull_request.head.repo.full_name == github.repository && github.actor != 'dependabot[bot]'
        with:
          username: ${{ secrets.DOCKERHUB_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.DOCKERHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Build test image
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v7
        env:
          DOCKER_BUILD_SUMMARY: false
          DOCKER_RECORD_UPLOAD: false
        with:
          context: .
          build-args: |
            PYTHON_VERSION=${{ matrix.python-version }}
            PREFECT_EXTRAS=[dev]
            NODE_VERSION=${{ steps.get_node_version.outputs.NODE_VERSION }}
          tags: prefecthq/prefect-dev:${{ steps.get_image_tag.outputs.image_tag }}
          outputs: type=docker,dest=/tmp/image.tar
          cache-from: type=gha,scope=test-${{ matrix.python-version }},ignore-error=true
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max,scope=test-${{ matrix.python-version }},ignore-error=true

      - name: Test Docker image
        run: |
          docker load --input /tmp/image.tar
          docker run --rm prefecthq/prefect-dev:${{ steps.get_image_tag.outputs.image_tag }} prefect version

      - name: Install packages
        run: uv sync --locked

      - name: Set database connection URL
        if: ${{ startsWith(matrix.database, 'postgres') }}
        run: echo "PREFECT_SERVER_DATABASE_CONNECTION_URL=postgresql+asyncpg://prefect:prefect@localhost/prefect" >> $GITHUB_ENV

      - name: Start docker registry
        run: >
          docker run
          --name "prefect-test-registry"
          --detach
          --publish 5555:5000
          registry:2

      - name: Check git diff
        run: |
          git diff --exit-code

      - name: Run tests
        run: |
          uv run pytest tests --ignore=tests/typesafety \
          -m "not windows" \
          --numprocesses auto \
          --maxprocesses 6 \
          --dist worksteal \
          --disable-docker-image-builds \
          --only-service docker \
          --durations 26

      - name: Check database container
        # Only applicable for Postgres, but we want this to run even when tests fail
        if: always()
        run: |
          docker container inspect ${{ job.services.postgres.id }} \
          && docker container logs ${{ job.services.postgres.id }} \
          || echo "Ignoring bad exit code"

  run-typesafety-test:
    name: typesafety
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
        with:
          persist-credentials: false
          fetch-depth: 0
          filter: blob:none

      - name: Set up uv
        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v7
        with:
          enable-cache: true
          python-version: "3.12"
          cache-dependency-glob: "pyproject.toml"

      - name: Install packages
        run: uv sync --locked

      - name: Run tests
        run: |
          uv run pytest tests/typesafety \
          --disable-docker-image-builds

content.thinking:
Perfect! I found the workflow. The job I need to reproduce is "Server Tests - python:3.10, sqlite". Looking at the workflow:

- The job runs on ubuntu-latest
- It uses python 3.10
- For the "Server Tests" test-type, the modules are: `tests/server/ tests/events/server --ignore=tests/server/database/ --ignore=tests/server/orchestration/`
- It uses SQLite for this particular run
- It uses `uv` for dependency management

The key steps are:
1. Set up uv and Python 3.10 (using astral-sh/setup-uv@v7)
2. Install packages: `uv sync --locked`
3. Run tests: `uv run pytest tests/server/ tests/events/server --ignore=tests/server/database/ --ignore=tests/server/orchestration/ -m "not windows" --numprocesses auto --maxprocesses 6 --dist worksteal --disable-docker-image-builds --exclude-service kubernetes --exclude-service docker --durations 26`

For the sqlite case, no PREFECT_SERVER_DATABASE_CONNECTION_URL is set (it defaults to sqlite).

Now I need to:
1. Create a Dockerfile that sets up the environment with Python 3.10 and installs dependencies using uv
2. Create a run.sh script that runs the test command

Let me also check the pyproject.toml to understand the project structure better.

file.content:
[build-system]
requires = ["hatchling", "versioningit"]
build-backend = "hatchling.build"

[project]
name = "prefect"
dynamic = ["version"]
description = "Workflow orchestration and management."
readme = "README.md"
requires-python = ">=3.10,<3.15"
license = { text = "Apache-2.0" }
authors = [{ name = "Prefect Technologies, Inc.", email = "help@prefect.io" }]
classifiers = [
    "Natural Language :: English",
    "Intended Audience :: Developers",
    "Intended Audience :: System Administrators",
    "License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License",
    "Programming Language :: Python :: 3 :: Only",
    "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.10",
    "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.11",
    "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.12",
    "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.13",
    "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.14",
    "Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries",
]
dependencies = [
    # Server dependencies
    "aiosqlite>=0.17.0,<1.0.0",
    "alembic>=1.7.5,<2.0.0",
    "apprise>=1.1.0,<2.0.0",
    "asyncpg>=0.23,<1.0.0",
    "click>=8.0,<9",
    "cryptography>=36.0.1",
    "dateparser>=1.1.1,<2.0.0",
    "docker>=4.0,<8.0",
    "jinja2>=3.1.6,<4.0.0",

content.thinking:
Good, I have a good understanding of the project now. Let me create the Dockerfile and run.sh script.

Key information:
- Python 3.10
- Uses uv for dependency management
- The test command is: `uv run pytest tests/server/ tests/events/server --ignore=tests/server/database/ --ignore=tests/server/orchestration/ -m "not windows" --numprocesses auto --maxprocesses 6 --dist worksteal --disable-docker-image-builds --exclude-service kubernetes --exclude-service docker --durations 26`
- Uses SQLite database (no special database setup needed)
- Runs on ubuntu-latest

Let me create the Dockerfile. The base image should be ubuntu:22.04 (which is what ubuntu-latest maps to).

The Dockerfile should:
1. Use ubuntu:22.04 as base
2. Install Python 3.10
3. Install uv
4. Copy the repo to /app
5. Install dependencies with uv sync
6. Copy run.sh
7. Run the tests

Let me also think about system dependencies. Prefect needs:
- git (likely)
- build-essential (for C extensions)
- Various system libraries

Let me create the Dockerfile and run.sh now.

content.text:
Now I'll create the Dockerfile and run.sh script for reproducing the job.

## PHASE 2 — Write Dockerfile and run.sh

input.content:
FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV PY_COLORS=1

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    python3.10 \
    python3.10-venv \
    python3.10-dev \
    git \
    curl \
    build-essential \
    libffi-dev \
    libssl-dev \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh

ENV PATH="/root/.local/bin:${PATH}"

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

RUN uv sync --locked

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV PY_COLORS=1

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    python3.10 \
    python3.10-venv \
    python3.10-dev \
    git \
    curl \
    build-essential \
    libffi-dev \
    libssl-dev \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh

ENV PATH="/root/.local/bin:${PATH}"

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

RUN uv sync --locked

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

content.thinking: Now let me create the run.sh script with the exact test command from the workflow YAML.

input.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -e

cd /app

echo "Running Server Tests with Python 3.10 and SQLite..."

uv run pytest tests/server/ tests/events/server \
  --ignore=tests/server/database/ \
  --ignore=tests/server/orchestration/ \
  -m "not windows" \
  --numprocesses auto \
  --maxprocesses 6 \
  --dist worksteal \
  --disable-docker-image-builds \
  --exclude-service kubernetes \
  --exclude-service docker \
  --durations 26

if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then
  echo "FINAL_STATUS = SUCCESS"
else
  echo "FINAL_STATUS = FAIL"
  exit 1
fi
